_instructions: Copy this file, fill in your project data, then run: babok run --context your_file.json
scope: Implementation of SAP S/4HANA system replacing legacy ERP (SAP ERP 6.0 EhP7). Project covers Finance (FI/CO), Procurement (MM), Sales (SD), and Production Planning (PP) modules. Includes migration from on-premise to private cloud.

budget.note: Budget approved Q1 2026, no increase expected

pain_points: Manual month-end closing takes 5 business days (target: 2 days)
No real-time inventory visibility across locations
45% of purchase orders processed manually via email
SAP ERP 6.0 end of mainstream maintenance in 2027

quantitative: Reduce month-end closing from 5 to 2 business days
qualitative: Full KSeF e-invoicing compliance by December 2026
Unified data model across all business units
Improved management reporting with real-time data

constraints: No additional budget beyond approved range
Core business operations cannot be disrupted during go-live
IT team of 3 people (limited internal capacity)
Must maintain SAP BusinessObjects BI integration
assumptions: SAP S/4HANA 2023 or newer will be used
Implementation partner will be selected via RFP process
Key users will be available 30% of their time during blueprint and testing phases
Data migration will cover 3 years of historical data
Parallel run period of 1 month before full cutover
risks_known: Key user availability during peak production months
Data quality issues in legacy system
